tasks.title: Refine sections.ideation.research_goal

Suggested skills: inno-idea-generation
Quality gate: The selected direction is distinct from direct tensorization-only or sparsity-only baselines; The idea states a falsifiable claim about efficiency and interpretability rather than only a broad intuition.
Stage guidance: Convert the broad ambition into a concrete research objective.

tasks.title: Refine sections.ideation.problem_framing
